'''ngachasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foenem|foenem]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foenem|foenem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngachasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæchæsæth|ngæchæsæth]] || [[word:ngæchæsæj|ngæchæsæj]] || [[word:ngæchæsæsh|ngæchæsæsh]] || [[word:ngæchæsæ|ngæchæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngachachasath|ngachachasath]] || [[word:ngachachasaj|ngachachasaj]] || [[word:ngachachasash|ngachachasash]] || [[word:ngachachasa|ngachachasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngachasath|ngachasath]] || [[word:ngachasaj|ngachasaj]] || [[word:ngachasash|ngachasash]] || [[word:ngachasa|ngachasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngachafsath|ngachafsath]] || [[word:ngachafsaj|ngachafsaj]] || [[word:ngachafsash|ngachafsash]] || [[word:ngachafsaf|ngachafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngachasatha|ngachasatha]] || [[word:ngachasaja|ngachasaja]] || [[word:ngachasasha|ngachasasha]] || [[word:ngachasaka|ngachasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngachasath|ngachasath]] || [[word:ngachasaj|ngachasaj]] || [[word:ngachasash|ngachasash]] || [[word:ngachasa|ngachasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngachasathal|ngachasathal]] || [[word:ngachasajal|ngachasajal]] || [[word:ngachasashal|ngachasashal]] || [[word:ngachasakal|ngachasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngachasathatha|ngachasathatha]] || [[word:ngachasajaja|ngachasajaja]] || [[word:ngachasashasha|ngachasashasha]] || [[word:ngachasaka|ngachasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngachasathan|ngachasathan]] || [[word:ngachasajan|ngachasajan]] || [[word:ngachasashan|ngachasashan]] || [[word:ngachasakan|ngachasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngachasathaoro|ngachasathaoro]] || [[word:ngachasajaoro|ngachasajaoro]] || [[word:ngachasashaoro|ngachasashaoro]] || [[word:ngachasakaoro|ngachasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
